name: dev-context-methodology
description: Project lifecycle tracking and context management using the Dev Context Methodology (DCM)

commands.name: track-new
commands.description: Onboard a new project to the tracker

commands.name: track-status
commands.description: Show status for one or all tracked projects

commands.name: track-advance
commands.description: Advance a project to its next lifecycle stage

commands.name: track-todo
commands.description: Add, complete, or list backlog items for a project

commands.name: track-update
commands.description: Quick updates to a project's tracker files

commands.name: track-refresh
commands.description: Rebuild the overview dashboard from all project tracker files

commands.name: track-incident
commands.description: Log an incident to a project's incident log

commands.name: track-sprint
commands.description: Create, close, or show sprint status for a project

commands.name: track-metrics
commands.description: Generate or show project metrics from stage history, sprints, and incidents

skills.name: dev-context-init
skills.description: Use when setting up a new workspace with Dev Context Methodology, or when the user asks to initialize DCM tracking in their workspace

skills.name: track-suggest
skills.description: Use when the user asks what to work on next, needs project recommendations, or wants to prioritize their backlog across projects

skills.name: track-insights
skills.description: Use when the user wants cross-project analysis, bottleneck identification, or incident pattern reports across all tracked projects

skills.name: track-retro
skills.description: Use when the user wants to run a sprint retrospective, review what worked and what didn't, or extract process improvements from recent work
